body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/downloadBillFile 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/downloadBillFile 
 ## 接口描述 
根据单据文件唯一id下载单据上的附件 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: GET  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001","maxLength":"","required":false}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billFileSeqId","exampleValue":"13526","label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80id","required":true}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
{BaseUrl}/v1/bills/downloadBillFile?OPAUID=XFT00001&billFileSeqId=13526
#### 响应报文
返回文件内容：ResponseEntity<byte[]>(data, headers, HttpStatus.OK)；data为文件字节数组，
即byte[] bytes = response.body().bytes()就能拿到文件  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|
  | --- | --- |
  |  | 附件不存在 |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/bills/downloadBillFile

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/bills/downloadBillFile

接口描述

根据单据文件唯一id下载单据上的附件

调用方式

METHOD: GET

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"请求头根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"请求体根节点"},"children":[]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"query根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"OPAUID","label":"%E8%96%AA%E7%A6%8F%E9%80%9A%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"XFT00001","maxLength":"","required":false}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"billFileSeqId","exampleValue":"13526","label":"%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%94%AF%E4%B8%80id","required":true}}]}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"响应头根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"响应体根节点"}}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{BaseUrl}/v1/bills/downloadBillFile?OPAUID=XFT00001&billFileSeqId=13526

响应报文

返回文件内容：ResponseEntity<byte[]>(data, headers, HttpStatus.OK)；data为文件字节数组， 即byte[] bytes = response.body().bytes()就能拿到文件

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息
附件不存在
